case_title: MEX EXPRESS, INC. VS. LITTLE TOKYO

docket_entries.description: FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE TOKYO
